commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum Platform {
  INSTAGRAM
  FACEBOOK
  TIKTOK
  YOUTUBE
}

enum AccountType {
  BUSINESS
  CREATOR
  PAGE
  CHANNEL
  PERSONAL
}

enum ContentType {
  POST
  REEL
  STORY
  VIDEO
  SHORT
  OTHER
}

enum ContentState {
  PENDING
  SYNCED
  FAILED
}

enum ExportFormat {
  CSV
  XLSX
}

enum ExportStatus {
  PENDING
  COMPLETED
  FAILED
}

model User {
  id             String             @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  email          String             @unique @db.VarChar(255)
  passwordHash   String?            @map("password_hash") @db.Text
  displayName    String?            @map("display_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  createdAt      DateTime           @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt      DateTime           @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  socialAccounts SocialAccount[]
  monitoredContent MonitoredContent[]
  reportExports  ReportExport[]

  @@index([email], map: "users_email_idx")
  @@map("users")
}

model SocialAccount {
  id            String           @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  userId        String           @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  platform      Platform
  accountId     String           @map("account_id") @db.VarChar(255)
  accountName   String           @map("account_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  accountType   AccountType?     @map("account_type")
  accessToken   String           @map("access_token") @db.Text
  refreshToken  String?          @map("refresh_token") @db.Text
  expiresAt     DateTime?        @map("expires_at")
  connectedAt   DateTime         @default(now()) @map("connected_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime         @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  user          User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  monitoredContent MonitoredContent[]

  @@unique([userId, platform, accountId], map: "social_accounts_user_platform_account_key")
  @@index([userId, platform], map: "social_accounts_user_platform_idx")
  @@index([platform, accountId], map: "social_accounts_platform_account_idx")
  @@map("social_accounts")
}

model MonitoredContent {
  id               String           @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  userId           String           @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  socialAccountId   String           @map("social_account_id") @db.Uuid
  platform         Platform
  contentId        String?          @map("content_id") @db.VarChar(255)
  contentUrl       String           @map("content_url") @db.Text
  contentType      ContentType?     @map("content_type")
  title            String?          @db.VarChar(500)
  status           ContentState     @default(PENDING)
  publishedAt      DateTime?        @map("published_at")
  lastSyncedAt     DateTime?        @map("last_synced_at")
  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime         @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  user             User             @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  socialAccount    SocialAccount    @relation(fields: [socialAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  engagementMetrics EngagementMetric[]

  @@unique([socialAccountId, contentUrl], map: "monitored_content_account_url_key")
  @@index([userId, platform], map: "monitored_content_user_platform_idx")
  @@index([socialAccountId], map: "monitored_content_social_account_idx")
  @@index([status], map: "monitored_content_status_idx")
  @@map("monitored_content")
}

model EngagementMetric {
  id                 String          @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  monitoredContentId String          @map("monitored_content_id") @db.Uuid
  capturedAt         DateTime        @default(now()) @map("captured_at")
  likes              Int             @default(0)
  comments           Int             @default(0)
  shares             Int             @default(0)
  saves              Int             @default(0)
  favorites          Int             @default(0)
  views              Int             @default(0)
  reach              Int             @default(0)
  impressions        Int             @default(0)
  reposts            Int             @default(0)
  watchTimeHours     Decimal?        @map("watch_time_hours") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  totalEngagement    Int             @default(0) @map("total_engagement")
  rawPayload         Json?           @map("raw_payload")
  createdAt          DateTime        @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  monitoredContent   MonitoredContent @relation(fields: [monitoredContentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([monitoredContentId, capturedAt], map: "engagement_metrics_content_captured_idx")
  @@index([capturedAt], map: "engagement_metrics_captured_idx")
  @@map("engagement_metrics")
}

model ReportExport {
  id            String        @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  userId        String        @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  platform      Platform
  format        ExportFormat
  fileName      String        @map("file_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  filePath      String        @map("file_path") @db.Text
  recordsCount  Int           @map("records_count")
  filters       Json?
  status        ExportStatus  @default(COMPLETED)
  exportedAt    DateTime      @default(now()) @map("exported_at")
  createdAt     DateTime      @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime      @updatedAt @map("updated_at")
  user          User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId, exportedAt], map: "report_exports_user_exported_idx")
  @@index([platform, exportedAt], map: "report_exports_platform_exported_idx")
  @@map("report_exports")
}
